message:
fix(storage): replace remaining batched IN-clause operations with row-by-row queries for fsqlite robustness

Systematically replace DELETE and UPDATE operations that used dynamic
IN-clause placeholders with row-by-row equivalents across 7 storage
methods. This avoids fsqlite's reported issues with IN-clause parsing
and reliability when handling many parameters at once.

Methods updated:
- export_hashes_for_ids() (DELETE from export_hashes)
- mark_dirty() (INSERT into dirty_issues)
- mark_not_dirty() (DELETE from dirty_issues)
- rebuild_blocked_cache() (DELETE from blocked_issues_cache)
- update_issue_updated_at() (UPDATE issues)
- clear_dirty_flags() (DELETE from dirty_issues)
- rebuild_marked_dirty_from_events() (DELETE from dirty_issues)

This completes the fsqlite compatibility work started in commit b9a0f25.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
